title: ipomoea capitiformis
intro: Ipomoea capitiformis, also known as Purpleback Morning Glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Ipomoea capitiformis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea capitiformis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
